freshness.cadence: Update when prototype parity changes, new funnel counts are known, or open UX/content decisions move.

summary.focus: Track the first active BriefLink funnel from prototype parity through sharing and recipient open behavior.
summary.sourceOfTruth: Manual operating inputs until product instrumentation is live.

sections.title: Prototype Parity Status
sections.description: Whether the shipped experience matches the approved prototype slice closely enough to trust funnel observations.

items.label: Canonical slice
items.note: Approved as the active product slice to mirror operationally.

items.label: Implementation parity
items.note: Engineering has active frontend/backend implementation work, but parity is not yet confirmed complete.

items.label: Funnel-readiness confidence
items.note: Manual counts are useful for trend visibility, but not for final conversion conclusions until parity closes.

sections.title: Core Funnel
sections.description: Manual source-of-truth counters for the first product loop.

metrics.label: Create-brief starts
metrics.definition: Number of sessions/users who begin the create-brief flow.

metrics.label: Create-brief completions
metrics.definition: Number of successfully completed brief generations.

metrics.label: Share-link copies
metrics.definition: Number of times users copy the generated brief/share link.

metrics.label: Read-view opens
metrics.definition: Number of recipient/read-side opens of a shared brief link.

sections.title: Manual Source of Truth
sections.description: Where operators should collect and overwrite dashboard values until instrumentation is available.

fields.label: Counting method
fields.value: Manual tally from prototype tests, QA walkthroughs, founder/operator usage, and any temporary logs.

fields.label: Update trigger
fields.value: Overwrite counts when any new observed session meaningfully changes the funnel picture.

fields.label: Primary owner
fields.value: vizops maintains the dashboard; product/engineering should supply new observed values.

fields.label: Confidence note
fields.value: Record directional truth, not false precision. Leave value null if no reliable count exists.

sections.title: Open UX/Content Decisions Tied to Prototype Gaps
sections.description: Decision list to resolve before parity can be called complete and funnel interpretation can tighten.

items.decision: Confirm exact create-brief entry-state and CTA copy used in the approved prototype.
items.impact: Affects what counts as a funnel start and whether start-rate comparisons are apples-to-apples.

items.decision: Confirm what completion means operationally: brief generated, brief saved, or share-ready state.
items.impact: Changes completion counting and denominator logic.

items.decision: Confirm the share action to track as canonical: copy link, native share, or both.
items.impact: Determines whether share-link copies are a narrow proxy or the actual share metric.

items.decision: Confirm reader open definition: unique viewers, total opens, or first open per brief.
items.impact: Prevents read-view metrics from overstating engagement.

items.decision: Confirm any missing microcopy or loading/error states that differ from the prototype.
items.impact: Prototype mismatch can distort drop-off and qualitative feedback.
